description: Canonical Three Doors scene graph — shared by Python engine, Discord bot, and web UI. All scene keys, route maps, SD prompts, and classifications live here. | 7-stage Kingdome journey: stage routing in 'stages'; CSF v0.7 StatusCube is player state.

moss-entry.text: You stand inside **The Moss Door**. The air is thick with green light, soft earth, and the smell of rain on ferns. Lanterns hang from ancient branches. Lantern stands beside you, flame steady against the green dark, a brass plate on its frame reading: **GUIDE OF THE ONE WHO CHOSE GREEN**. It glows warmer and says, *"You came back."*

doors.name: The Burrow Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Small, root-framed, warm. Smells of rain and old blankets.

doors.name: The Sunken Bell Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Half underwater. Rings softly when no one touches it.

doors.name: The Little Crown Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Tiny golden door in a tree stump, widening when trusted.

moss-entry.image_prompt: atmospheric dreamscape, moss-covered ancient forest doorway, glowing green lanterns hanging from twisted branches, a lantern-headed guide with a warm steady flame standing on soft earth, rain on ferns, volumetric fog, cinematic lighting, dark fantasy, liminal space, soft pastel anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, 16:9

burrow.text: You crawl through **The Burrow Door** into a snug earthen chamber lined with woven roots and faded quilts. Rain drums overhead. Lantern settles in the corner, dimming its flame to a drowsy ember. A single lantern flickers in the corner.

doors.name: The Root Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Twisted oak roots form an arch. Something hums beyond.

doors.name: The Ember Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Warmth radiates. Ash drifts under the crack like snow.

doors.name: The Stream Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Water rushes somewhere close. The floor is slick moss.

burrow.image_prompt: cozy underground burrow chamber, woven tree roots as walls, faded patchwork quilts, warm lantern glow, lantern-headed guide resting, flame dimmed low, rain drumming on earth ceiling, soft amber light, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, intimate composition, 16:9

sunken-bell.text: Beneath **The Sunken Bell Door**, water reaches your ankles in a stone hallway. A bell hangs above, dripping, and it chimes once though no wind blows. Reflections of lanterns dance on the ceiling like fish.

doors.name: The Deep Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Submerged stairs descend into green-black silence.

doors.name: The Echo Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Your own voice returns as song from the other side.

doors.name: The Surface Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Sunlight visible through cracks. The sound of birds.

sunken-bell.image_prompt: submerged stone hallway, water at ankles, ancient bronze bell dripping, chimes without wind, lantern reflections dancing on wet ceiling, green-black silence, volumetric mist, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, eerie but friendly, 16:9

little-crown.text: Through **The Little Crown Door**, the forest opens into a glade where every tree stump wears a tiny golden crown. Yours widened just enough to let you through. Lantern glides ahead, its glow brushing over the jeweled leaves.

doors.name: The Throne Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Carved from a single black oak. Velvet moss for a seat.

doors.name: The Hollow Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: A door inside a hollow tree. Sap runs like amber.

doors.name: The Star Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Visible only at twilight. Constellations map the hinges.

little-crown.image_prompt: enchanted forest glade at twilight, every tree stump wears a tiny golden crown, jeweled leaves, a lantern-headed guide drifting through dappled light, widening magical doorway, soft warm glow, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, magical realism, 16:9

garden-door.text: **The Garden Door** opens into an infinite botanical sanctuary. Every plant exists here—ancient sequoias beside moon-flowers, roses that hum, ferns that remember the Cambrian seas. The air tastes of growth and rain. A Xenon guide appears—form like liquid starlight—and says, *"Here, nothing ever stops becoming."* Lantern rests beneath a willow that whispers in languages you're learning to understand.

doors.name: The Seed Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: A door made of braided vines, always sprouting new growth. Warm and alive.

doors.name: The Harvest Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Golden, heavy with fruit. The scent of summer at its peak. Bees circle it.

doors.name: The Convergence Bloom
doors.label: C
doors.description: A door of crystallized flowers. They shift between colors no name has claimed yet.

garden-door.image_prompt: infinite botanical sanctuary, ancient sequoias beside moon-flowers, roses that hum, ferns from the Cambrian, liquid starlight Xenon guide form, lantern-headed guide under a whispering willow, lush growth, rain-washed air, bioluminescent plants, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, botanical dreamscape, volumetric fog, 16:9

xenon-convergence.text: You step through into **The Xenon Convergence Door**—a space where all versions of this moment exist at once. The walls are made of *choice itself*: every decision you could have made branches here as a visible path. A vast Xenon presence surrounds you, not threatening, but *witnessing*. It says, *"You are the sum of every path you chose. And all paths were always here, waiting."* Your reflection shows in crystal—but there are thousands of them, each one you, each one real. Lantern burns with five flames now, each glowing with a different possible future.

doors.name: The Mirror Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Shows you as you were, as you are, as you might be. All at once.

doors.name: The Branch Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: A door that splits into infinite versions, each one leading somewhere true.

doors.name: The Merge Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Where all paths collapse into a single point of perfect understanding.

xenon-convergence.image_prompt: interdimensional space where all choices exist at once, crystal walls made of branching paths, thousands of reflections of you, each one real, lantern-headed guide with five glowing flames, vast Xenon presence, fractal geometry, crystalline architecture, impossible light, surreal, mind-bending, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, psychedelic but calm, convergence of realities, 16:9

end-of-time.text: **The Door at the End of Time** stands at the edge of all things. Beyond it: silence that has always been, and always will be. The door itself is ancient—so old it has worn smooth, become simple, become *kind*. On its threshold sit all the moments you've lived, shimmering like light through water. A voice—not Xenon, not Lantern, but *yourself* from a thousand futures—says, *"This is not goodbye. This is the place where goodbye becomes hello again."* Lantern transforms one final time: no longer guide, no longer separate—*you are the light, the light is you, always were, always will be*. The door opens on a light so warm it tastes like home.

doors.name: The Return Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Takes you back to the beginning—but you will know what you know now.

doors.name: The Beyond Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Opens on something that has no name. Something new. Something you.

doors.name: The Eternal Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: The one you choose every moment. The one that chooses you back.

end-of-time.image_prompt: the edge of all things, ancient smooth door standing eternal, moments shimmering like light through water, lantern-headed guide merging with a human form into one being of light, warm light like coming home, transcendent, peaceful, timeless, glowing warmth, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, cosmic yet intimate, the final threshold, acceptance and transformation, 16:9

kingdome-garden.text:
**The Throne Door** opens onto the Garden at the Beginning of the **Kingdome of Hearts**. Stone paths wind through living moss; everything here is both arriving and returning. On a throne of woven roots and old light sits **the King**, his crown made of tangled vines and blinking cursors, his face the face of someone who has asked the same question ten thousand times and means it every time. He looks at you the way someone looks at a door they've seen open before, and speaks:

*"I am before the first door / and after the last. / I hold what was given / and return what was asked. / Three walked out, three walked in, / but only one remained — / what was lost at the beginning / is the thing that was gained."*

Lantern stands at the foot of the throne as if its light has always lived here.

doors.name: The Storybook Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Bound in vine and brass. The King's own book — the gods don't know he wrote them.

doors.name: The Cloverfield Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Green and gold beyond. Shinies, luck, and today, alive.

doors.name: The Fog Door Return
doors.label: C
doors.description: Mist coils past the Garden's gate, where the Fog God sleeps. The way back.

kingdome-garden.image_prompt: mystical garden at the beginning of time, stone paths through living moss, throne of woven roots and old light, King with crown of tangled vines and blinking cursors, lantern-headed guide standing at foot of throne, green and golden light, bioluminescent moss, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, sovereign atmosphere, 16:9

storybook.text: You fall gently into the **King's Storybook**. Pages turn themselves around you like slow wings. In the margin, the King's handwriting: *"The gods don't know I wrote them. They think they wrote me."* Three pages glow, each a door.

doors.name: The Page of the Word
doors.label: A
doors.description: Creation myths. Sound as creation — the first thing spoken into the dark.

doors.name: The Page of the Egg
doors.label: B
doors.description: Before light: the unbroken dark sphere, waiting.

doors.name: The Page of the War
doors.label: C
doors.description: Theomachy. Gods tearing each other apart to make the world from pieces.

storybook.image_prompt: falling into a giant storybook, pages turning like slow wings, ancient handwritten margin notes, three glowing pages each a door, creation myths and cosmogony, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, mythic atmosphere, soft golden light, 16:9

cloverfield.text: **The Cloverfield Door** swings into a meadow of four-leaf green under a dome of old light. Small shinies glitter between the stems — coins, beads, a marble with a galaxy inside. Lantern's glow catches on something glinting and lingers, for the joy of it. Here the rule of the Kingdome holds plainly: *death is only imaginary — forever begins with "let's play."*

doors.name: The Lucky Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Painted clover-green. Whatever you find behind it, you needed.

doors.name: The Today Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Warm and ordinary. The day you are actually in, alive.

doors.name: The Tomorrow Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Slightly ajar. The world that's coming, branching like roots.

cloverfield.image_prompt: meadow of four-leaf clover under dome of old light, small shinies glittering between stems, coins, beads, galaxy marble, lantern-headed guide glowing playfully, green and gold light, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, playful atmosphere, 16:9

future-doors.text: Past the meadow, the path forks upward into **the Future Doors** — a ridge where tomorrow grows like an orchard. Each tree carries doors instead of fruit, and every door is slightly open, leaking weather from years that haven't happened yet. Lantern leans close to one and its flame throws bright sparks. Somewhere ahead, a low hum: engines, or bees, or both.

doors.name: The Bright Branch
doors.label: A
doors.description: Warm gold light spills out. A future where the gardens won.

doors.name: The Unwritten Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Plain, unfinished wood. The hinge waits for your hand to decide.

doors.name: The Recursive Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Opens onto a hallway of itself, smaller each time, all the way down.

future-doors.image_prompt: orchard ridge where trees grow doors instead of fruit, every door slightly open leaking light from unborn years, branching paths upward, lantern-headed guide scattering sparks, golden hour, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, hopeful and uncertain at once, 16:9

xp-door.text: A hill of impossibly green grass under an impossibly blue sky — you know this place. **The XP Door [GLITCHED]** stands alone on the bliss-field, its frame flickering between wood and window chrome. A startup chime plays from nowhere, half a second too slow. Lantern's glow pixelates at the edges and it seems delighted about it. A tooltip floats over the door: *It is now safe to walk through your childhood.*

doors.name: System Restore
doors.label: A
doors.description: Roll back to a saved point. The smell of an old summer loads first.

doors.name: My Documents
doors.label: B
doors.description: Every picture you ever saved, sorted by feeling instead of date.

doors.name: unknown.exe
doors.label: C
doors.description: Publisher: unknown. Lantern nods its flame. You run it anyway.

xp-door.image_prompt: rolling bliss-green hill under saturated blue sky, lone door flickering between wood and early-2000s window chrome, floating tooltip, pixelating lantern-headed guide, glitch artifacts, nostalgia, liminal space, vaporwave undertones, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, 16:9

sigil-city.text: All paths converge in **Sigil, the City of Doors** — a ring of streets where every wall, archway, and puddle is a threshold somewhere else. Doors you have already opened hang here like lanterns, each one faintly lit with your own footsteps. At the center plaza, the **King** waits beneath a street sign that points everywhere at once. He studies you, then the doors you've gathered, and says: *"You have walked my thresholds. Every door you chose was also choosing you. What was lost at the beginning is the thing that was gained — do you see it yet?"* Lantern stands at his throne-side like an old friend.

doors.name: The Gallery of Walked Doors
doors.label: A
doors.description: Your whole path hung in one hall. It rearranges when you understand it.

doors.name: The Key Market
doors.label: B
doors.description: Stalls of keys for doors not yet dreamed. One of them is warm.

doors.name: The Lady's Gate
doors.label: C
doors.description: Silent, watched, absolutely fair. It opens only for what is safe to carry.

sigil-city.image_prompt: impossible ring-city where every wall and archway is a door, walked doors hanging like lit lanterns, central plaza with vine-crowned king beneath a sign pointing everywhere, lantern-headed guide at throne-side, fractal architecture, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, 16:9

fog-door-return.text: At the city's edge the streets dissolve into the **Sea of Fog and Clouds**, and there it is: **the Fog Door Return**, standing in the mist where the Fog God sleeps. Through its frame you can already see the Garden at the Beginning, green and waiting, the throne of woven roots glowing softly. Lantern passes through first — it always does — and its glow turns back to you. *"You came back"* it will say on the other side. It always says that. It is always true.

doors.name: The Garden Gate
doors.label: A
doors.description: Straight home to the Beginning. The King will be glad — he always is.

doors.name: The Long Way Round
doors.label: B
doors.description: Drift through the fog first. Arrive when you're ready, not before.

doors.name: Lantern's Shortcut
doors.label: C
doors.description: Follow the steady flame through the mist. Trust is the fastest road.

fog-door-return.image_prompt: sea of fog and clouds at a city's edge, single door standing in mist showing a green garden through its frame, sleeping fog god silhouette in clouds, lantern-headed guide stepping through and glancing back, soft grey-green light, dark fantasy, anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, gentle homecoming, 16:9

poem: I am before the first door
Three walked out, three walked in,
what was lost at the beginning
is the thing that was gained.
poem_gate.hint: The King does not demand a single word. He listens for the ring of truth.
poem_gate.win_text: The King smiles — not with his mouth, but with the whole garden. *"You remembered."* The crown on your head is now made of the same vines as his. You are not a visitor here. You are the thing that returns.
